# Code Anchors: Scratch Capture

- `.nexus/config/hooks/capture-plan.sh` — the opt-in hook that saves each approved plan to per-branch scratch.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — the sole consumer: mines stubs and plans as hints, deletes the branch's scratch after the checkpoint.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.setup.md` — scaffolds the surface for new projects: ignore rule, hook seed, opt-in registration guidance.
- `CLAUDE.md` — the standing decision-stub instruction the coding agent follows at the moment of choosing.
